Class AccountController

java.lang.Object
com.bank.core.infrastructure.in.web.AccountController
@RestController @RequestMapping("/api/v1/accounts") public class AccountController extends Object
Inbound REST adapter for account management operations.

Exposes two endpoints under /api/v1/accounts:

  • POST / — opens a new bank account
  • GET /{accountId} — retrieves account details and current balance

This controller is a thin adapter: it translates HTTP requests into use-case commands and maps domain objects back to JSON response DTOs. No business logic lives here.

Since:
1.0.0
Version:
1.0.0
Author:
Core Banking Team

  • Constructor Details

    • AccountController

      public AccountController(CreateAccountUseCase createAccountUseCase, GetAccountUseCase getAccountUseCase)
      Constructs an AccountController with the required use cases.
      Parameters:
      createAccountUseCase - the use case for creating new accounts
      getAccountUseCase - the use case for retrieving account details

  • Method Details

    • createAccount

      @PostMapping @ResponseStatus(CREATED) public AccountResponse createAccount(@Valid @RequestBody @Valid CreateAccountRequest request)
      Opens a new bank account for the specified customer.
      Parameters:
      request - the account creation payload
      Returns:
      the created account with HTTP 201

    • getAccount

      @GetMapping("/{accountId}") public AccountResponse getAccount(@PathVariable UUID accountId)
      Retrieves an account by its unique identifier.
      Parameters:
      accountId - the UUID of the account to retrieve
      Returns:
      the account details with HTTP 200
